query: SELECT p.id, p.name, p.email, p.status, COUNT(pr.id) AS property_count FROM peppr_partners p LEFT JOIN peppr_properties pr ON pr.partner_id = p.id GROUP BY p.id, p.name, p.email, p.status ORDER BY property_count DESC, p.name;
